title: Lego Island 1 Blocks
description: A mod for minecraft that adds some of the games base textures as blocks in minecraft.
body:
# Welcome to the world of lego island!

In this mod you can bring back the feeling of nostalgia from playing lego island but in minecraft!

Simply craft a computer and place it near a villager and then buy either the modern disc or the beta disk and have access to all you blocks you could wish for.

Just place the cd in the pc along with your desired block (stone, water, netherack, grass, dirt or sand) and press convert. Then take your blocks and create a happy paradise with the feeling of lego island.

And if your home is too quiet you can now place the cd into a jukebox to hear the warm feeling music from the lego islands credits
